jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Glenmark Pharmaceuticals in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Glenmark Pharmaceuticals:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Glenmark Pharmaceuticals!
